SEOUL_DONT_LEAVE_WARNING: You are leaving the mission area
SEOUL_FAILED_DRONE_SWARM: Shoot the attack drones before they get too close
SEOUL_FAILED_DRONE_SWARM1: Shoot the attack drones before they get too close
SEOUL_FAILED_TO_SAVE_JACKSON: You failed to save your Squad Mate
SEOUL_GIVE_EXPLOSIVES_HINT: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Give Will the Charges
SEOUL_PRESS_X_FOR_COUNTER_THRUSTERS_PC: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 while Falling to Safely Descend
SEOUL_THROW_THREAT_HINT: Press ^3[{+smoke}]^7 to Throw a Threat Grenade
SEOUL_TRAIN_BOOST_DODGE: Press ^3[{+sprint}]^7 and Move  Left, Right and Back to Boost Dodge.
SEOUL_TRAIN_BOOST_DODGE_SP: Press ^3[{+sprint}]^7 and Move  Left, Right and Back to Boost Dodge.
SEOUL_TRAIN_BOOST_SLAM: Double tap ^3[{+gostand}]^7 then press ^3[{+stance}]^7 to Boost Slam
SEOUL_USE_SMART_GRENADE: Press ^3[{+frag}]^7 to throw a Smart Grenade
SEOUL_WARN_LEAVING_SQUAD: Turn back, you are abandoning your Squad
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_A10SINBOUNDETATOT: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7A-10's inbound, ETA to target 2 minutes.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_AC130SONTARGETSUP: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7AC130s on Target, supplying support fire for ground troops.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_AWACSREPORTENEMYM: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7AWACS report enemy movement 10 clicks northeast.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_B52SINBOUNDZONEAL: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7B-52s Inbound zone Alpha Kilo, relay message to steer clear of bombing zone.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_ENEMYAIRSUPPORTFL: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7Enemy air support flying in.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_ENEMYSU37SANDMIG2: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7Enemy SU-37's and Mig-29s inbound to our location, get the 82nd to intercept.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_GETTHOSEASTSTOPRO: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7Get those ASTs to provide covering fire!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_HEAVYARMORONTHELE: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7Heavy Armor on the left flank!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_HOLDTHISLINEUNTIL: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7Hold this line until we get booster support!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_INEEDASNIPERTEAM: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7I need a sniper team!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_KC10SUNABLETOMEET: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7KC-10s unable to meet 86th Fighter Wing. Will Divert.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_NEEDFASTMOVERSATG: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7need fast movers at grid position 9 9 6!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_RDAIRLIFTWINGREPO: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^763rd Airlift Wing reporting heavy losses.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_RDSUPPORTDIVISION: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7323rd Support Division reinforcing the 319th HQ Ops
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_STAIRBORNECONFIRM: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7101st Airborne confirms heavy enemy activity at grid location Hotel Oscar.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_STSPACEWINGREQUES: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^721st Space Wing requesting reinforcements.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_AMR_U2RECONREPORTSAAA: ^2Ambient Military Chatter: ^7U2 recon reports AAA  East of the Banboro intersection
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_BCR_BEADVISEDENEMYCON: ^2Battle Commander: ^7Be advised, enemy contact at 20,000 feet, five degrees west of drop point.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_BCR_SOLIDCOPYBRAVOTHR: ^2Battle Commander: ^7Solid copy, Bravo three-two. Negative on casevac, do what you can.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_BCR_SOLIDCOPYONALL: ^2Battle Commander: ^7Solid copy on all. Three-two, do not engage unless compromised. Sitreps in 10 minute intervals. We need all the intel we can get on any grid north of the intersection.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_COPYTHAN: ^2Cormack: ^7Copy that. Keep your eyes open, team.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_COPYTHATEVERYONEK: ^2Cormack: ^7Copy that. Everyone, keep your eyes open.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_COPYWEARERECIVING: ^2Cormack: ^7Copy, we are receiving. We are proceeding on foot, ETA fifteen mikes.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_DEMOTEAMISKIA: ^2Cormack: ^7Demo team is KIA. We are attempting to complete the mission ourselves.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_DEMOTEAMONE: ^2Cormack: ^7Demo Team One, this is Badger zero-one! Do you copy?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_DEMOTEAMONETHISIS: ^2Cormack: ^7Demo Team One, this is Badger zero-one! Are you there, over?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_GRANITESQUAD: ^2Cormack: ^7Badger squad, 227th! Providing support for Demo Team One!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_HAVOCMISSILES: ^2Cormack: ^7Havoc missiles. The launcher must be close.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_KEEPTHOSEDRONESOF: ^2Cormack: ^7Keep those drones off us! Need to buy time for the EMP to charge up!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_NEEDTOCROSSOVER: ^2Cormack: ^7Need to cross over to the other side. Get your boosters ready.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_NOWERENOTBUTWEWAI: ^2Cormack: ^7No we're not. But we wait for another demo team,  and that launcher is going to move position.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_OKAYMITCHELLYOURE: ^2Cormack: ^7Okay. Mitchell, you're with Irons. We'll cover your movement.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_OKAYOKAYICANSEETH: ^2Cormack: ^7Okay, okay. I can see their explosive packs. We can still do this.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_OKAYWENEEDTOGET2: ^2Cormack: ^7Okay, we need to get our feet on the ground and link up with Demo Team One.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_OKAYWENEEDTOGETOU: ^2Cormack: ^7Okay, we need to get our feet on the ground. Irons, you've got point.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_REMEMBERSHORTBURS: ^2Cormack: ^7Remember, short bursts to control your fall.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_SPACEMANGRANITETW: ^2Cormack: ^7Spaceman, Badger Two is down, I need immediate medivac.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_SPACEMANIMSEEINGH: ^2Cormack: ^7Spaceman, I'm seeing heavy enemy fire in our drop path!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_SPACEMANWEAREDOWN: ^2Cormack: ^7Spaceman, we are down hard, 500 meters northwest off of our intended LZ. Our pod imbedded about forty stories up in side of a...hotel, I think. How copy?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_SPACEMANWEVEENGAG: ^2Cormack: ^7Spaceman, we've engaged a North Korean fire team in our building!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_STAYFOCUSED: ^2Cormack: ^7Stay focused. Nothing we can do for them now.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_STICKTOGETHERANDK: ^2Cormack: ^7Stick together and keep your heads down.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_THATSOURTARGET: ^2Cormack: ^7That's our target. We need to find our demo team.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_THEHAVOCLAUNCHER: ^2Cormack: ^7The North Koreans are knocking out major roads.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_THERESTHEHAVOCLAU: ^2Cormack: ^7There's the Havoc launcher. Demo team should be nearby.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_THEYREPOPPINGSMOK: ^2Cormack: ^7They're popping smoke! Toss a threat grenade!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_USEYOURBOOSTERSTO: ^2Cormack: ^7Use your boosters to get over this truck.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WELLHAVETOJUMP: ^2Cormack: ^7We'll have to jump down. Everyone get your boosters ready.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WELLTRYTOMAKEIT: ^2Cormack: ^7We'll try to make it down. Proceeding to the command post at the Osan/Banporo intersection. Granite zero-one out.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WENEEDTOGETEYES: ^2Cormack: ^7We need to get eyes on the demo team. Mitchell, over here.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WENEEDTOPUSHTHROU: ^2Cormack: ^7We need to push through this hotel!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WEREGONNAHVETOGET: ^2Cormack: ^7We're gonna have to get around this sinkhole to get to the commercial district.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CRK_WILLTHATLAUNCHERI: ^2Cormack: ^7Will, that launcher is heavily armored. You're going to have to find an access panel and plant the charges inside it.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CV1_INEEDTOCALLMYHUSB: ^2Civilian 1: ^7I need to call my husband! He was at work when they attacked!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CV1_ITSMYLEGITHINKITS: ^2Civilian 1: ^7*coughing* It's my leg. I think it's broken.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CV1_OHGODWEREGOINGTOD: ^2Civilian 1: ^7Oh god, we're going to die down here!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CV2_SOLDIERSSHOULDBEH: ^2Civilian 2: ^7Soldiers should be here to help us soon.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_CV3_WHENISTHEMILITARY: ^2Civilian 3: ^7When is the military going to help us?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_DMO_COPYTHATWEARESTON: ^2Demo Leader: ^7Copy that! We are strongholding our position, over!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_DMO_GRANITEWHERETHEHE: ^2Demo Leader: ^7Badger, where the hell are you? We're getting torn up! Need fire support--
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_DMO_HEARYOUGRANITEZER: ^2Demo Leader: ^7--hear you Badger zero-one! We are approaching the Havoc launcher position! Sending you vidlink coordinates now!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_DNL_ARESARESWENEEDSOM: ^2Daniels: ^7Ares, Ares, we need some fireworks at the Osan/Banporo intersection! How copy?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_DNL_THEYREALREADYONTH: ^2Daniels: ^7They're already on the move! Thought you guys were fragged!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_GDN_ATLASPMCRESCUEFOR: ^2Gideon: ^7Atlas PMC rescue force. We're transporting a principle.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_GDN_ITSAFUCKINMESSBET: ^2Gideon: ^7It's a fuckin mess. Better odds taking the east tunnel out.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_JKN_ATLASWILLISNTTHAT: ^2Jackson: ^7Atlas. Will, isn't that your Dad's company?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_JKN_THEYGOTTHEBESTGEA: ^2Jackson: ^7They got the best gear, the best pay. Why'd you never join?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_MRN1_PREPARETOCOPY: ^2Marine 1: ^7Prepare to copy, grid Charlie Alpha, 3 1 5, niner niner 2! Over!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_MRN1_THISISBADGERTWO: ^2Marine 1: ^7This is Badger Two Actual, we have engaged two five enemy armor ten klicks due east of the Osan intersection! Armor is supported by several hundred dismounts, grids to follow! Over!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_MRN2_ROGERWEAREEGRESS: ^2Marine 2: ^7Roger. We are egressing to Banporo street, copy?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_MRN2_WEHAVEAMAN: ^2Marine 2: ^7We have a man down, I repeat we have an arterial bleeder! Requesting immediate casevac, how copy over?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_MRN3_NOTGETTINGTHROUG: ^2Marine 3: ^7Not getting through. Switching to aux channel.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_PA_ALLCITIZENSPROCEED: ^2PA: ^7All citizens, proceed to evacuation sites immediately. I repeat, proceed to evacuation sites.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_PA_ALLLAWENFORCEMENTP: ^2PA: ^7All law enforcement personnel report to your stations.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_PA_REPORTANYSUSPICIOU: ^2PA: ^7Report any suspicious activity to your local authorities immediately.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_PA_RETURNTOYOURHOMES: ^2PA: ^7Return to your homes. Curfew is in effect.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_RZR_THISISDEFENDER23C: ^2Razorback Pilot: ^7This is Defender 2-3, coming in to assist.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_ALLUNITSALLUNITS: ^2Spaceman: ^7All units, all units, this is Spaceman, commencing drop in 1 mike.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_BADGERTWOTHISIS: ^2Spaceman: ^7Badger Two, this is Spaceman, standing by to copy, over.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_COPYDROPPINGATGRI: ^2Spaceman: ^7Copy. Dropping at grid 3 1 5 niner, repeat 3 1 5 niner, cross checked and verified.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_COPYTHATDROPGREEN: ^2Spaceman: ^7Copy that, drop is still green, drop is still green.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_COPYTHATGRANITE: ^2Spaceman: ^7Copy that, Badger zero-one, adjusting your trajectory.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_COPYTHATIFYOUARE: ^2Spaceman: ^7Copy that. If you are able, link up with Demo Team One and provide fire support. Their target is multiple Havoc launchers in the vicinity.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_GRANITEZEROONE: ^2Spaceman: ^7Badger zero-one, be advised: we are tracking a drone swarm heading your way.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPM_UNDERSTOODENGAGEA: ^2Spaceman: ^7Understood. Engage at will and regroup on the ground floor.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPN_CORMACKTHATLAUNCH: ^2Spaceman: ^7Cormack, that launcher is tearing us up! What's your status?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_SPN_KEEPYOUREYESOPENF: ^2Spaceman: ^7Badger squad, the North Koreans have invaded the city and are pushing towards your position. Watch out for fire teams in your AO.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_TNT_THANKSFORTHEHELPB: ^2Tank Pilot: ^7Thanks for the help badger team!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_COPYMITCHELLGIVEM: ^2Will: ^7Copy. Mitchell, give me a hand here.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_DAMNTHINKMYARMSBR: ^2Will: ^7Ah shit. Damn, I think my arm's broke. That fucking hurts.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_FEELSTRONGASHELLI: ^2Will: ^7Feel strong as hell in this exo!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_GOTASHEERDROP: ^2Will: ^7Got a sheer drop on this side. There's a clear spot over here.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_GOTSOMEWOUNDEDHER: ^2Will: ^7Got some wounded here, sir. Can we assist?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_HEYSEEYOUONTHEOTH: ^2Will: ^7Hey! See you on the other side.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_HOLDTHATHATCHOPEN: ^2Will: ^7Hold that hatch open, I'll plant the charges.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_ILLGETTHECHARGESS: ^2Will: ^7I'll get the charges, sir. Just give me cover.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_ITSLIFTINGOFFYOUG: ^2Will: ^7It's lifting off. You gotta go, now!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_ITSOKAYSEEYOUONTH: ^2Will: ^7It's okay. I'll see you on the other side.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_KEEPHITTINGTHEMMI: ^2Will: ^7Keep hitting them, Mitchell! We're almost there!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_MITCHELLWEREOUTOF: ^2Will: ^7Mitchell, we're out of time! You gotta jump now!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_MYFIRSTKILL: ^2Will: ^7My first kill. Huh. Hands are shaking.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_OKLETSMAKESURETHE: ^2Will: ^7Ok, let's make sure these men didn't die for nothing.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_SHITDONTWORRYABOU: ^2Will: ^7Shit. Don't worry about that timer. One more time. Pull!
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_THISISNOTHINGLIKE: ^2Will: ^7This is nothing like basic, huh Mitchell?
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_THOSEWERETHESWARM: ^2Will: ^7Those were the swarm operators. Got their control rig.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_WANTEDTOSERVEMYCO: ^2Will: ^7Wanted to serve my country, not my old man.
SUBTITLE_SEOUL_SEO_WIL_WERELIFTINGOFFYOU: ^2Will: ^7We're lifting off. You gotta go, now!
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_ENTER_PC: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_EXIT: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Exit the MD Turret
_X4WALKER_WHEELS_MELEE_HINT: Press ^3[{+melee}]^7 to Enter the MD Turret
